Assembly: The assembly iyLasFlav2.hap1.1 is based on 267x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 4gg (21,007 - 22,100 Kbp) are unknown.

Assembly: The assembly dcPerAmph1.hap1.1 is based on 74x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.
